title: The Confidence Man
writer: George Ade, Robert Hobart Davis, Laurie York Erskine
actors: Thomas Meighan, Virginia Valli, Larry Wheat
plot: Dan Corvan and Larry Maddox, salesmen for promoters of phony oil stock, endear themselves to the people of Fairfield, Florida, in an attempt to fleece skinflint Godfrey Queritt. When they are at the point of success, an old lady a...
